_README_remove_these_underscored_keys_be: JSON doesn't support comments — strip every line starting with _ before use.
_1_what_this_is: MCP server config for Claude Code (VS Code extension) on Rocky Linux / RHEL / any Linux distro.
_3_substitute: Replace <USERNAME> in all three paths below with the Linux user that ran ./client/bootstrap.sh.
_4_prereq: You must have already run ./client/bootstrap.sh on THIS machine. That installs the MCP bridge to ~/.local/share/mcp-trust-anchor.

_5_trust_anchor_location.same_rocky_box: If Trust Anchor (docker compose up or server/install.sh) runs on the same Rocky box as Claude Code: TRUST_ANCHOR_URL = http://localhost:8000
_5_trust_anchor_location.different_box: If Trust Anchor runs on a different host (e.g., your Rocky server, your lab box): TRUST_ANCHOR_URL = http://<trust-anchor-host-or-ip>:8000
_5_trust_anchor_location.no_https: HTTP is fine on a trusted LAN. For anything beyond that, front the Trust Anchor with HTTPS and use https://...

_6_after_saving: Restart VS Code (or reload window: Ctrl+Shift+P -> 'Developer: Reload Window').
You should see 'secure-tools' as an available MCP server.
Ask: 'list my accessible devices'  -- this hits list_accessible_devices against your Trust Anchor.
